upcoming.title: Ste Martaen Presents: MEETSTOP VEGAN DELI POP-UP
upcoming.body:
ORDER
RSVP

By popular demand, MeetStop by SteMartaen is bringing their deli menu to Cudahy!!! A great lineup of made-to-order deli hoagies and more. As always, pre-orders are recommended but not required.

Order in advance via Tock or take your chances at the bar day-of.
upcoming.excerpt: By popular demand, MeetStop by SteMartaen is bringing their deli menu to Cudahy!!! A great lineup of made-to-order deli hoagies and more. As always, pre-orders are recommended but not required.

upcoming.title: *CLOSED* for a Private Event
upcoming.body:
The bad news: There’s something happening here and you’re not invited.

The good news: You can have your own party! Get in touch about a private rental today.
upcoming.excerpt: The bad news is that you aren’t invited. The good news is that you can rent us out for your own shindig sometime — get in touch!

6:30PM DOORS / 7:30PM MUSIC

CONAN
Website | Spotify | Facebook | Instagram
Conan - the sound of unending hammer blows into the earth. A galloping charging war horse heading for your town. So heavy that the gods look away, intimidated by their unearthly delivery.

RUIN DWELLER
Bandcamp | Facebook | Instagram
Apocalyptic Death Metal from Madison, WI

upcoming.excerpt:
This show was insane when they came through last year. Don’t believe us? Ask a friend.

FFO: Bongripper · Weedeater · Belzebong ❤️☠️🖤

upcoming.title: Levels / Strain / Moral Grey
upcoming.body:
TIX
RSVP

X-RAY ARCADE PRESENTS
LIVE MUSIC / ALL AGES
6:30PM DOORS / 7:30PM MUSIC
$22 CASH DAY OF

LEVELS
Spotify | Facebook | Instagram
LEVELS are a cyber/industrial metal band from Arkansas known for fusing heavy music with elements of pop, electronic, and drum and bass. Since forming in 2016, they have independently amassed millions of streams, drawing influence from artists as diverse as Billie Eilish, The Prodigy, Static-X, and The Weeknd.

STRAIN
Apple | Facebook | Instagram
Kenosha Progressive Deathcore

MORAL GREY
Instagram
Alternative Metal from Wisconsin
upcoming.excerpt: Levels are headed to our very famous arcade!

5:30PM DOORS / 6:30PM MUSIC
$20 CASH DAY OF

FOX LAKE
Website | Spotify | Facebook | Instagram
Metal from Denver, CO.

FACE YOURSELF
Website | Spotify | Facebook | Instagram
Face Yourself is a transcontinental modern Deathcore band that was founded with members from New York, New Jersey, Colorado, and France. Face Yourself has established themselves in the modern Deathcore era with throwbacks to the early Myspace Deathcore era mixed with their own unique sound that consists of nothing but sheer relentlessness.
